heading: Inapplicability of certain laws to lands acquired under section 47e
label: 47f Inapplicability of certain laws to lands acquired under section 47e
text: The provisions of the Federal Power Act, as amended [ et seq.], shall not apply to any of the lands added to the Yosemite National Park pursuant to the provisions of .16 U.S.C. 791asection 47e of this title
notes: References in TextThe Federal Power Act, referred to in text, was in the original the “Act approved , as amended, known as the Federal Water Power Act,” and was redesignated as the Federal Power Act by . The Federal Power Act is , , and is classified generally to chapter 12 (§ 791a et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.June 10, 1920section 791a of this titleact June 10, 1920, ch. 28541 Stat. 1063section 791a of this title
